query:
SELECT p.batchNo, p.id AS productId, p.productCode, p.poNumber, p.currentStationCode, p.currentStatus,
       t.id AS taskId, t.stationCode AS taskStationCode, t.stationTaskStatus, t.completedAt
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_tasks t ON t.productId = p.id AND t.stationTaskStatus IN ('pending','in_progress','overdue')
WHERE p.batchNo IN (
'01400003031','01400003032','01400003033','01400003034','01400003035','01400003036','01400003037','01400003038','01400003039',
'01400003040','01400003041','01400003042','01400003043','01400003044','01400003045','01400003046','01400003047','01400003048'
)
ORDER BY p.batchNo, t.stationCode;
